[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)

- Description: PR1 — Public-Key Lookup Cache: generator emits per-key files
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/tokenomics/pull/359
  
  Details:
  PR1 of PUBLIC_KEY_LOOKUP_CACHE_PLAN.md. Completed pre-flight checklist (6 items), then implemented:
  
  - Added `commitMultipleFilesToGithubViaTreeApi_()` — Git Trees API for atomic multi-file commits
  - After building dao_members.json, publisher now computes sha256 per ACTIVE key and writes public_keys/<sha256>.json per-key files
  - Writes public_keys/_manifest.json for future incremental diffing (PR2)
  - dao_members.json shape untouched — backward compatible
  
  Pre-flight completed:
  - Consumer audit: 6 point-lookup callers identified for PR3
  - PAT scope confirmed (contents:write on treasury-cache)
  - Reader PAT available (TRUESIGHT_DAO_AUTOPILOT)
  - Privacy: email omitted from per-key files
  - Freshness: contents-API for sign-in, raw for warm-cache
  - Beta surface: not needed for generator-only PR1
